rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE WILLIAM CAVALIER et al TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order And Request For Monetary Sanctions.
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, November 20, 2008. Trustee Wells Fargo Bank's motion for a protective order is granted based on the representation of counsel that neither Mr. Skootsky nor Ms. Malouf will be called as witnesses at trial. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. = (610/BEC)
